programme.desc: Adam discovers the pastor he hired for his wedding is a phony and he and Andi aren't really married; Adam scrambles to fix it before Andi finds out.

programme.title: According to Jim

programme.title: Gaither Gospel Hour
programme.desc: An all-star lineup of beloved artists singing songs that honor our nation's foundation of faith, hard work and community.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.sub-title: Finding God's Will for Your Life
programme.desc: Did you know God created you for a purpose? Well, He did! Today, Joyce shares the keys to uncovering God's desire for you as His child.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.sub-title: The Ministry of the Holy Spirit
programme.desc: How belief determines behavior; one's higher calling.

programme.title: Praise
programme.desc: Matt and Laurie Crouch host Mike Mazzei.

programme.title: Worship With The Binions and Friends
programme.desc: David and Nicole Binion host dynamic nights of worship featuring top gospel artists.

programme.title: Jesus: The Game Changer
programme.desc: Karl Faase travels to the U.K., U.S., Singapore, India and Australia, interviewing authors, academics and modern-day game changers about how the life and teaching of Jesus changed the world and why it matters.

programme.title: Centuries Collide
programme.desc: Before Bernie Sanders was pictured in mittens, and before President Barack Obama bestowed himself with the Presidential Medal of Freedom, World War II perfected the art of the meme.

programme.title: My First Trip to Israel
programme.desc: Sheila Walsh is in Israel and brings a first-time perspective on the land where Jesus walked and ministered.

programme.title: Praise
programme.sub-title: Faith and Inspiration With Tyler Perry
programme.desc: Joel and Victoria Osteen sit down with Tyler Perry as he shares a message that will challenge and strengthen your faith.

programme.title: Hagee Ministries
programme.desc: Hagee Ministries are committed to change America by taking all the Gospel to all the world and to all generations.

programme.title: Turning Point With Dr. David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Dr. Jeremiah contrasts the groaning and suffering of this world with the glory that awaits God's people in the next.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Temptation often exposes the weak areas in our lives. Learn how obeying God, staying calm in adversity and trusting His strength can help you overcome trials and grow stronger in faith.

programme.title: Steven Furtick
programme.desc: From Elevation Church in Charlotte, N.C., Pastor Steven Furtick offers inspirational messages through his sermons.

programme.title: Joseph Prince
programme.sub-title: X-Factor Confidence That You Can't Fake
programme.desc: Real truths for real life, discover clarity, purpose and a better way to live every day.

programme.title: Robert Jeffress
programme.sub-title: Survival Tip #8: Learn From the Past
programme.desc: The teaching ministry of American Southern Baptist pastor and television host, Robert Jeffress; he is a senior minister of the First Baptist Church in Dallas as well as a Fox News contributor.

programme.title: Life Today With James Robison
programme.desc: A Christian who could not seem to overcome his sin shares his deliverance from demonic oppression.

programme.title: The Supernatural Now
programme.desc: Apostle Guillermo Maldonado is the Sr. Pastor and founder of King Jesus International Ministry (Ministerio Internacional El Rey Jesus), considered one of the fastest growing multicultural churches in the United States.
